emergenceOverScripting.rationale: Interventions create systemic responses without scripted event injection.

reciprocalCausality.rationale: Policy/institution intervention -> individual behavior changes -> city/system indicators -> policy adaptation.

multiScaleCoevolution.rationale: Shock and trait-distribution interventions propagate across person/city/nation/world-order layers.

verdict.label: Partial verification; inspect failing test evidence.
